news.summary: Bitcoin hit over $101,000 on May 8, marking a 4.6% daily gain that triggered $205 million in liquidations. $8.3 billion in Bitcoin put options for the next three months are mostly below $101,000 and may expire worthless. Major options strategies on Deribit include "bull put spread," "bull call spread," and "bull diagonal spread." The futures market shows substantial demand for short positions, with an open interest of $69 billion, potentially leading to short covering if Bitcoin surpasses $105,000, aiding in a new all-time high. The Bitcoin futures premium has been under 8% for three months, impacting the "carry trade" strategy. Traders anticipate a Bitcoin rally if short covering occurs.
news.headline: Bitcoin options show potential for new price highs; $8.3B in put options may expire worthless at $102K BTC price. $205M liquidated from bearish futures. Traders keen on $105K trigger for potential rally to surpass $109K ATH soon. Blockbuster trades at top exchanges; bullish strategies dominate. Prospect of short covering if BTC jumps above $105K, hinting at new ATH in coming months. Carry trade strategy less appealing with current Bitcoin futures premium. Short covering might accelerate with BTC spike above $105K, boosting chance of new record highs.
US Commerce Secretary Lutnick: The UK deal helps ease reliance on the China supply chain a bit.

news.summary: In the latest Phase 3 analysis, PL9643 has emerged as a promising first-of-its-kind treatment with the potential for complete symptom resolution. Examination of responders has revealed a significant improvement in symptom resolution in PL9643-receiving patients when compared to those on a placebo. Specifically, 6 out of 13 symptoms...
news.headline: Palatin unveils promising Phase 3 results of PL9643 for dry eye disease at ARVO 2025, with 6 of 13 symptoms resolved.

news.summary: In Westerly, Rhode Island on May 8, 2025, reports were made public that The Washington Trust Company has added three banking experts to a specialized retail banking business development group. These professionals, known as Business Banking Relationship Officers, are tasked with collaborating with Washington Trust's retail branch network to enhance their services.
news.headline: Washington Trust hires 3 Business Banking Relationship Officers to new team to work with branch network.

news.summary: An experienced professional in the industry will lead the commercial expansion efforts at Sera Prognostics Inc. in Salt Lake City. The company, known as The Pregnancy Company® and trading under Nasdaq with the symbol SERA, aims to enhance maternal and neonatal health through advanced pregnancy solutions. This strategic move is set to drive innovation and foster growth within the organization.
news.headline: Sera Prognostics names Lee Anderson as Chief Commercial Officer to drive growth and innovation at the company. #SERA

news.summary: Over 30 countries are participating in the 2025 Human Rights and Humanitarian Forum and Humanitarian Summit in Los Angeles. This event brings together changemakers and grassroots humanitarians from around the world to address pressing issues. Set for May 8, 2025, this forum highlights the need for global unity in addressing humanitarian challenges.
news.headline: 2025 Human Rights and Humanitarian Forum in LA unites 30+ countries, inspiring action for aid and dignity.

news.summary: Celsius Holdings, Inc. revealed its upcoming participation in several key investor conferences. Specifically, the company is set to be part of the Goldman Sachs Global Staples Forum on May 13, 2025, where a fireside chat is scheduled around 2:30 p.m. ET. Following this, Celsius Holdings will join the J.P. Morgan Fast Moving Consumer & Wellness Forum on May 15, 2025. Subsequently, the company will also attend the B. Riley Securities 25th Annual Investor Conference taking place from May 21-22, 2025, and the Deutsche Bank Global Consumer Conference from June 3-4, 2025, featuring another fireside chat. These events are crucial for Celsius Holdings, as they provide opportunities to engage with investors and stakeholders, further enhancing visibility and potentially driving growth for the company.
news.headline: Celsius Holdings to join investor conferences: Goldman Sachs (May 13), J.P. Morgan (May 15), B. Riley (May 21-22), Deutsche Bank (June 3-4). $CELH #LiveFit.

news.summary: Affirm Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: AFRM) announced their Q3 results after the bell on Thursday. The report revealed a quarterly loss of one cent per share, surpassing the anticipated loss of three cents. Their quarterly revenue stood at $783.13 million, exceeding the estimated $783.03 million and marking a notable increase from the $576.16 million seen in the same quarter last year. For more information, kindly refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Affirm's Q3 results beat expectations: 1 cent earnings per share, $783.13M revenue (up from $576.16M last year), stock sinks.
Alaris Equity Partners Income Trust reports Q1 2025 financial results.

news.summary: Semrush Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: SEMR), a top online visibility management SaaS platform, revealed plans to participate in upcoming investor conferences. These include the 20th Annual Needham Technology, Media, & Consumer 1x1 Conference on May 9, 2025 (Virtual) and the J.P. Morgan 53rd Annual Global Technology, Media and Communications Conference on May 14, 2025 (Boston, MA). The company will hold a presentation and engage in one-on-one investor meetings at these events.
news.headline: Semrush Holdings will participate in upcoming investor conferences on May 9th and May 14th, 2025.

news.summary: HealthStream, a prominent healthcare technology platform company, headquartered in Nashville, Tennessee, has recently disclosed a significant corporate development. The company's Board of Directors has given the green light to initiate a fresh share repurchase initiative for their common stock. This new program enables HealthStream to buy back a total of $25 million worth of outstanding shares of common stock. The repurchases will be conducted sporadically in the open market or through private transactions, possibly including a Rule 10b5-1 plan.
news.headline: HealthStream (Nasdaq: HSTM) to repurchase up to $25 million of outstanding shares of common stock.

news.summary: In Fishers, Indiana, First Internet Bank and Increase have been recognized as winners in American Banker’s 2025 Innovation of the Year awards for their success in the Payments category. The prestigious awards celebrate top technology-driven innovations, with a special focus on banking. Together, First Internet Bank and Increase collaborated on High-fidelity ACH, a cutting-edge tech solution designed to enhance the speed and dependability of Automated Clearing House (ACH) transactions. This collaboration exemplifies that innovation can bring significant improvements without necessarily causing disruption. The recognition highlights the impact of their work in the industry, showcasing their commitment to advancing financial technology.
news.headline: First Internet Bank and Increase win American Banker’s Innovation of the Year for Payments category with High-fidelity ACH tech.

news.summary: Milwaukee-based Stratec Security Corporation, listed on Nasdaq as STRT, reported a significant achievement in their fiscal 2025 third quarter. The company generated $20.7 million in cash from operations during this time period.
news.headline: STRATTEC SECURITY CORP (Nasdaq: STRT) reported $20.7M in cash from operations in FY 2025 Q3.

news.summary: Herc Holdings Inc. has prolonged its tender offer to purchase all outstanding shares of H&E Equipment Services, Inc. The offer includes $78.75 in cash and 0.1287 shares of Herc common stock for each H&E share, in accordance with the merger agreement dated February 1. Herc, trading under NYSE: HRI, holds the bid to acquire H&E, listed under NASDAQ: HEES. The offer extension was declared in Bonita Springs, Fla., without interest tied to the deal.
news.headline: Herc Holdings extends offer to acquire H&E Equipment Services, offering $78.75 in cash and 0.1287 shares of Herc stock per H&E share.

news.summary: The recent announcement made by President Trump regarding an agreement on Thursday is still pending finalization. The administration shared that the deal with one of America’s closest allies would mark the beginning of multiple forthcoming agreements.
news.headline: New U.S.-U.K. trade deal includes tariffs, awaits finalization. Trump Administration eyes more agreements with key ally.

news.summary: The board of directors at Ecolab Inc., based in St. Paul, Minnesota, has announced the appointment of Marion Gross as an independent director. Gross, who was formerly the Executive Vice President and Global Chief Supply Chain Officer at McDonald's, will be joining the Ecolab board as a member of the Compensation & Human Capital Management Committee and the Safety, Health & Environment Committee starting May 7, 2025. Her election to the board took place during today's Ecolab Annual Meeting of Stockholders.
news.headline: Ecolab adds Marion Gross, former EVP of McDonald's, as independent director; effective May 7, 2025.

news.summary: Bothell, Washington - On May 8, 2025, BioLife Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: BLFS), a prominent provider of cell processing tools and services for the cell and gene therapy (CGT) sector, has released updated call-in details for their Earnings.
news.headline: BioLife Solutions provides corrected call-in numbers for Earnings Call on May 8, 2025.

news.summary: Today, the stock market experienced widespread early gains driven by positive news of a trade deal between the United States and Britain, alleviating concerns among investors. Robinhood saw a significant increase. The Dow Jones ended the day 250 points higher due to the trade development, while Boeing outperformed as its stock surged past the buy point. Additionally, Bitcoin surpassed the $100,000 mark, marking a notable milestone.
news.headline: Dow Jones rises by 250 points on U.S.-UK trade deal, Boeing surges, Bitcoin surpasses $100,000 amid broad market gains.

news.summary: Galecto, Inc. reported its operating and financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. The company focused on developing treatments for oncology and liver diseases, with CEO Dr. Hans Schambye highlighting progress on GB3226, a dual inhibitor for AML. Cash and equivalents stood at $11.9 million as of March 31, 2025, enough to fund operations into 2026. R&D expenses were $0.7 million, down from $2.5 million in the prior year quarter. General admin expenses were $1.9 million, down from $3.3 million. Net loss for Q1 2025 was $2.5 million. Galecto is advancing drug candidates like GB1211 for liver cirrhosis and oncology indications, and BRM-1420 for AML. The company's financial position and future plans are outlined for potential investors.
news.headline: Galecto reported Q1 2025 results, $11.9M in cash, and decreased expenses. Their focus is on cancer and liver disease treatments.

news.summary: ACT Energy Technologies Ltd reported their financial results for the first quarter of 2025. They had revenues of $135.4 million, up 6% sequentially, with Adjusted EBITDAS of $19.7 million, a 12% increase from the previous quarter. Net income was $7.2 million, lower than $11.6 million in 2024 Q1. Operating days in Canada declined by 3% and in the US ramped up by 7% sequentially, contrasting with a 17% decline in US operating days year-over-year. The Company's gross margin percentage was 22%, and Adjusted gross margin percentage was 28%. They purchased 742,699 common shares under their normal course issuer bid for $4.5 million. The Company's liquidity was strengthened with $61.3 million undrawn capacity and $12.9 million cash balance. They successfully deployed 24 Rime MWD systems in the US by Q1, with plans for 26 more by Q2. President Tom Connors highlighted solid improvement in North American operating days. The Company aims to expand margins with selective investments and repurchase shares, strengthening financial position while expecting continued solid activity through the year. They anticipate a range of 40 to 50 daily job operations in the US and steady activity in Canada. Despite macroeconomic challenges, the Company remains cautiously optimistic. The financial highlights showed Adjusted EBITDAS of $19,699, net income of $7,248, cash flow of $18,685, and free cash flow of $7,875 in Q1 of 2025. Operating days decreased by 9% from the previous year, leading to an 18% decline in revenues. The company remains focused on reducing costs and increasing margins through technological investments.
news.headline: ACT Energy Technologies reports $135.4 million in Q1 revenues with $19.7 million in Adjusted EBITDAS, while net income was $7.2 million, showing a modest increase in performance. Company purchasing 742,699 common shares worth $4.5 million under their normal course issuer bid. Cash flow from operating activities increased to $18.7 million, and free cash flow rose to $7.9 million. Loans and borrowings reduced slightly to $50.3 million by March 31, 2025. The Company has undrawn capacity of $61.3 million, strengthening liquidity. Activities saw a slight decline in operating days and revenues compared to the previous year, with the U.S. experiencing some challenges in operating days and revenues. Margin expansion was witnessed in U.S. directional business with the deployment of Rime MWD systems. President Tom Connors optimistic about the Company's outlook and capital allocation plan."

news.summary: After conducting a strategic review and reprioritizing its pipeline, the company has decided to enhance its focus on its next-generation ADC portfolio. This decision will lead to a sharpened product candidate focus, with a significant emphasis on developing and advancing ADCs. The company will be targeting a total of XADC candidates for further development, highlighting a more streamlined and efficient approach to drug development. This move reflects the company's commitment to innovation and growth within the ADC space.
news.headline: Sutro Biopharma highlights Q1 2025 earnings and ADC portfolio focus after restructuring pipeline.

news.summary: The board of directors of Ecolab Inc. has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.65 per common share, payable on July 15, 2025. Shareholders of record as of June 17, 2025, will receive the dividend. Ecolab has consistently paid dividends on its common stock for 88 years. Ecolab (NYSE:ECL) is a leading global provider of water, hygiene, and infection prevention solutions and services, catering to millions of customers worldwide.
news.headline: Ecolab declares $0.65 quarterly cash dividend per share, to be paid on July 15, 2025, to shareholders of record on June 17, 2025.

news.summary: In St. Paul, Minnesota, Ecolab Inc. revealed during its annual stockholders meeting that all thirteen director nominees listed in the proxy statement were elected for a one-year term concluding in May 2026. Additionally, shareholders voted to approve, on an advisory basis, the compensation of the named executive officers outlined in the proxy statement. The appointment of PricewaterhouseCoopers was also ratified during the meeting.
news.headline: Ecolab Inc. had 13 director nominees elected for a one-year term, with executive compensation approved by stockholders.

news.summary: Theriva Biologics, a clinical-stage company focused on developing cancer treatments, recently completed a public offering of 6,818,180 shares of common stock and warrants to purchase the same number of shares at a combined price of $1.10 per share. The offering generated around $7.5 million in total gross proceeds for the Company, not including fees and expenses. The warrants included in the offering have an exercise price of $1.10 per share, are immediately exercisable, and will expire five years from their date of issuance.
news.headline: Theriva Biologics closes $7.5M public offering with 6,818,180 shares at $1.10 each, for cancer therapeutics.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, BioRestorative Therapies, Inc. disclosed that it will publicly reveal its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 post-market closure on May 14, 2025. BioRestorative, a company traded on NASDAQ under BRTX, specializes in stem cell-based treatments and merchandise. Subsequent to the financial disclosure, the management of BioRestorative will conduct a conference call to discuss the results and offer insights into the company's operations.
news.headline: BioRestorative Therapies to share Q1 2025 results on May 14; Stem cell innovator focused on regenerative medicine.

news.summary: Houston-based U.S. Energy Corporation, listed as USEG on NASDAQ, revealed plans to release its first quarter 2025 financial results on May 12, 2025, prior to the market opening. The company, known for its focus on growth in energy sectors and industrial gas assets, is set to provide insights into its performance during the mentioned period. This update signifies a significant event for investors and stakeholders alike, eagerly anticipating the detailed figures that will shed light on U.S. Energy's recent operations and financial standing.
news.headline: U.S. Energy Corp (NASDAQ: USEG) to release first quarter 2025 results on May 12.

news.summary: In Tyler, Texas on May 08, 2025, the Board of Directors of Southside Bancshares, Inc. (NYSE:SBSI), the parent company of Southside Bank, announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.36 per common share. Shareholders of record on May 22, 2025, will receive this dividend, scheduled for payment on June 5, 2025.
news.headline: Southside Bancshares, Inc. (NYSE:SBSI) declares quarterly cash dividend of $0.36 per share, payable on June 5, 2025.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Pittsburgh-based Montauk Renewables, Inc. disclosed its financial performance for the initial quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. The company, traded as MNTK on NASDAQ, focuses on renewable energy and excels in handling, reclaiming, and transforming biogas into renewable natural gas.
news.headline: Montauk Renewables reports Q1 2025 results for biogas-to-RNG conversion with strong financial performance.

news.summary: In New York on May 8, 2025, investment firm Cohen & Steers, Inc. announced via PRNewswire that their assets under management stood at a preliminary $87.5 billion as of April 30, 2025. This marked a slight decline of $70 million from the previous month, when assets were at $87.6 billion as of March 31, 2025. The decrease in assets was primarily attributed to distributions made during this period.
news.headline: Cohen & Steers' assets under management drop to $87.5 billion in April 2025, $70 million decrease from March.

news.summary: The Greater San Antonio's Regional Economic Partnership has achieved a major feat by being ranked among the top 20 economic development organizations in the United States, as per the prestigious recognition received on May 8, 2025. This acknowledgment highlights the organization's commitment to driving economic growth and prosperity in the region. The 2025 Mac... award signifies the excellence and impact of the Greater:SATX Regional Economic Partnership in the national economic development landscape. This achievement underscores the significance of their efforts and places them in a leading position among economic development organizations, showcasing their dedication to enhancing the economic vitality of the Greater San Antonio area.
news.headline: greater:SATX Regional Economic Partnership wins 2025 Mac Conway Award, ranking among top 20 economic development organizations in the nation.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Charter Communications, Inc. (NASDAQ: CHTR) based in Stamford, Connecticut, revealed that Christopher Winfrey, the President and Chief Executive Officer, is set to take part in the MoffettNathanson Media, Internet, and Communications event. The company's participation highlights its commitment to engaging with key industry players. This move demonstrates Charter's dedication to staying abreast of the latest trends and developments in the sector. Winfrey's involvement underscores Charter's proactive approach to keeping up with the rapidly evolving media, internet, and communications landscape.

news.summary: In Pine Bluff, Arkansas on May 8, 2025, it was reported that Simmons First National Corporation (NASDAQ: SFNC) declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.2125 per share for its Class A common stock. This dividend is set to be paid on July 1, 2025.
news.headline: Simmons First National Corp declares $0.2125 dividend per share on Class A stock, payable July 1, 2025.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation, a leading financial services company with the stock symbol BK on NYSE, revealed that Robin Vince, the CEO, is scheduled to deliver a speech at the Bernstein Autonomous Strategic Decisions Conference in New York at 3:30 p.m.
news.headline: BNY CEO to speak at Bernstein Autonomous Strategic Decisions Conference in NY at 3:30 p.m. May 8, 2025.

news.summary: Perimeter Medical Imaging AI, Inc., a medical technology company based in Toronto and Dallas, will be releasing its financial and operating results for the first quarter of 2025 after the market closes. The company is listed on the TSX-V as PINK and on the OTCQX as PYNKF. Stay tuned for updates on the company's performance.
news.headline: Perimeter Medical Imaging AI to report Q1 2025 financial results on May 13, 2025. TSX-V: PINK, OTCQX: PYNKF mentioned.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on May 8, 2025, Whitecap Resources Inc. ("Whitecap") and Veren Inc. ("Veren") received approval from the Court of King's Bench of Alberta for their proposed plan. Whitecap is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol WCP. Veren is listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: VRN) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: VRN). This final order signifies a significant milestone in their collaboration.
news.headline: Whitecap Resources Inc. and Veren Inc. receive final order for plan of arrangement from Court of King's Bench of Alberta.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Galecto, Inc., a biotechnology firm traded on NASDAQ under the symbol GLTO, shared its quarterly performance for the period finishing on March 31, 2025. The company concentrates on creating innovative therapies for cancer and liver disorders.
news.headline: Galecto reports Q1 2025 operating and financial results: Ended March 31st, 2025. Focused on oncology and liver diseases.
